title: Delicate Turkish Tortillas Su Boregi
description: A pungent and cozy Turkish dish featuring tortillas and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients, perfect for a snack or light meal. The glassy-jelly texture and flavors will transport you to the streets of Istanbul.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked spinach and scallions, crumbled feta cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Lay a tortilla flat and spread about 1/4 cup of the spinach and feta mixture onto the center of the tortilla.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the tortilla into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
Place the rolled tortillas seam-side down in a large baking dish and pour the water over them.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
